{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190514DE457A5BF042AAD9902F"}"},"total":1908},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7518283331801203481","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"豪看，豪看，非常豪看，电竞，ABO，还有兽耳（桀桀桀[舔屏]）虽然副cp多，但不影响主cp发展，这里面大多都是直球看的我爽爽的[害羞][害羞]
易余竹和姚狐，小狐狸是钓系啊啊啊啊啊啊！钓易余竹的时候也钓钓到我了[舔屏][舔屏]小狼和小狐狸要好好在一起哟[害羞]接着是祁燕和白洛洛，唉，白洛洛，要不说你是蠢兔子呢，还好有燕子喜欢你，番外在一起的过程可太棒了[害羞]然后是猫猫狗狗，好磕，呜呜呜，沐青崖，你一定要好好爱姜且，要一直喜欢小白猫[哭]还有安吴恙和鹿瑶，谁懂安姐直接在比赛场上官宣了，一开始只是不起眼的小粉丝，后来努力当上了解说员，到最后终于站在了她身边，带入小鹿的视角我真的哭死[哭]最后是就是冷茗和宋予安，番外的强制给我看爽了，桀桀桀[舔屏]抹茶冰激凌就是最吊的[送心]总之，小情侣们都要99呀
电竞文豪看，推荐[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750490647,"group_id":"7345842663955893272","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不必与他人契合，你热烈的爱属于你自己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7PEm4s3qsyddRztBu2hp4exC1NQDfGJjKezXJpXSi+2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2c2e18f2a1f14143b66435524fd59ca3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791322&x-signature=tDvIUa8n2GYzogej673B%2Bvzgaqg%3D","user_id":"3529912981920171","user_name":"在台南晒月亮的榆树"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3529912981920171","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345842663955893272","book_info":{"abstract":"【电竞+ABO+兽耳元素+破镜重圆+反向追夫火葬场+恋爱脑攻+高糖+微团宠+1v1双洁+强强】
看似搞怪实际超有心机嘴毒且白切黑的撩人刺客狐狸o（青梅酒）
×
看似沉稳偏执实际超级粘人恋爱脑还又茶又爱吃醋的灰狼侠者a（忍冬）
————————————————————

        《破晓时分》这款游戏风靡全国。
          传闻中，顶级战队的队长易余竹告白后被人甩了，所以总是黑着一张脸，让人不敢接近。
        两年后，某个偷心刺客分化了，来他的战队试训。
        易余竹（冷脸）：“我不认识你。”
        小狐狸笑眯眯的，“易余竹，你还不懂么？”
         “我在追你。”


         易余竹哪儿哪儿都好，姚狐都很喜欢。
         只不过……
         这家伙总是喜欢咬他的狐狸耳朵尖尖是怎么回事？
————————————————————
        不甜不要钱！！！
        自创游戏+私设如山+烂梗预警，这本书电竞皮，恋爱魂，主打一个感情线。作者对电竞一窍不通，又菜又爱玩儿，文笔极差，不喜勿喷。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o688b6f22f3c74d0167442f54a091c1b3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"奶汤锅子鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7345842663955893272","book_name":"【电竞】狐O归队后，狼A天天醋","book_short_name":"【破晓时分】","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384860","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9294人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":475,"name":"破镜重圆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=475&name=破镜重圆&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":853,"name":"白切黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=853&name=白切黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":872,"name":"追夫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=872&name=追夫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"categor 说实话，这真的是我看过最甜的一本电竞文了，小狐狸是又可爱又勾人，那大尾巴狼人设崩的死死的[偷笑]每一对cp都甜度超标，真的很好看。
电竞一直都是一个争议很大的职业，作者在这篇文里的立意做得很好，用中国自己的美景作为游戏地图，天安门出来的那一章我的真的很感动，电竞选手一直在被误解，但他们一直在努力，为了在另一个领域追逐梦想，为国争光。
少年少有凌云志，千帆历尽，不负浩然气
感谢作者[爱心]带来了这么好的一部作品"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735456720,"group_id":"7345842663955893272","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"本人是个爱看书的疯砸，嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿(˵¯͒¯͒˵)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7/wlatgegqt7ZJMyPBxNPA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/98f0732fee574eb8afdde4c78ded95f2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787211&x-signature=Y9SGrLzEEIByUgdJQI4MytSaKZM%3D","user_id":"917457541011051","user_name":"七弦声印九重天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"917457541011051","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345842663955893272","book_info":{"abstract":"【电竞+ABO+兽耳元素+破镜重圆+反向追夫火葬场+恋爱脑攻+高糖+微团宠+1v1双洁+强强】
